title: Cable Tiers
description: Adds better Exporter, Importer, Constructor, Destructor, Disk Interface, Autocrafter, Interface, Requester from Refined Storage and RSRequestify
body:
If you want to put this mod in your modpack, feel free to use it :)

This mod adds better Importer, Exporter, Constructor, Destructor, Disk Manipulator, Interface, Requester from Refined Storage and RSRequestify. Elite: 9 more filter slots, 2x faster
Ultra: 27 more filter slots, 5x faster, stack upgrade integrated
Mega: 45 more filter slots, 6.5x faster, stack upgrade integrated ### Special features: - Tag filtering - Side-specific inputs for autocrafting - Import mode for Autocrafters
